title: Tecnock Remote Control Cars for Kids Adults, 1:16 Scale 20km/h All Terrain Monster Truck, 2.4GHz Off-Road RC Car with Headlights & Chassis Lights, 2 Batteries for 60min Play, Toys Gifts for Boys Girls
features: 【Cool Headlights and Chassis Lights】High speed remote control truck are equipped with multiple LED lights. You can clearly see them both in the day and at night. Especially at night, the design of long line lights makes the whole car look more interesting.

【2 Batteries for 70 Mins Running】The RC car is packed with 2 x 1000 mAh rechargeable batteries and a USB charger. It will extend the driving time up to 70+ mins, which depends on the operation. The battery is charged via USB, which is fast and convenient.

【High Quality Durable Racing Car】This radio controlled car is made of safe and environment-friendly high-quality ABS material, which is wear-resistant, corrosion-resistant, non-toxic, and has a shock absorption effect. Its solid chassis and shell, and durable tires can easily drive the remote control car on the beach, beach, rock or concrete pavement.

【2.4GHz Anti-Interference Remote Control】The remote control operates in the 2.4GHz frequency band and has anti-interference effect. It can support multiple racing cars to compete at the same time. The longest control distance can reach 165 feet. Whether indoor or outdoor, it is an excellent cross-country monster truck.

【After Sales Service and Perfect Gifts】If you have any questions, please contact us on time. We will give you a satisfactory solution as soon as possible. This remote control car is extremely interesting for you and your children. It is very suitable for boys aged 8 up. Great gift for adults and kids.
description: Product Description Cool LED Front Headlight The bright headlights can help you determine the position of the truck and identify the driving direction when the light is insufficient. Cool Undercarriage Lights The flashing bottom lamp gives you an unusual experience and adds a fantastic effect to the moving truck. Durable Rubber Tire The anti-skid rubber tire has super grip and wear resistance. It can pass any rough road and is more durable than ordinary tires. Shock Absorber System Which can absorb the vibration caused by the collision of the wheels and better protect the parts in the car to resist bottoming out over large jumps. Powerful Automobile Motor Powerful motor to provide power to the car, the highest speed up to 25km/h, so you can experience the fun of racing competition. Front Car Bumper The front of the remote control car is equipped with a bumper, which has a strong anti-collision function so that it can drive on the highway, off-road, and any rough roads. What is Included: 1 x remote control car 1 x remote control 1 x charging cable 1 x screwdriver 1 x manual 2 x 1000mAh battery Specification: Frequency: 2.4GHz Speed: 25+ km/h Remote Distance: > 165 feet Size: 12 x 7.48 x 8.86 inches (1/16) Playing Time: 2 x 35+ mins (Depends on playing operations) Remote Control Battery: 4 x 1.5V AA Batteries(No in Include) Please Note: To maintain the stability condition of the battery, please remove it from the toy truck and turn off the truck when charging, otherwise, it can damage the battery lifespan. Please control the car according to our user manual to avoid the hurt caused by the inappropriate control.
